title: Class parameter type without default value is never given value

features.name: class with mailbox member declaration
features.description: Code should include a class declaration with a mailbox-typed member variable

features.name: class constructor with mailbox argument and member assignment
features.description: Code should include a class constructor that accepts a mailbox argument and assigns it to a class member

features.name: class member of unspecified type with new_call
features.description: Code should include a class member variable typed to an unspecified type used with new() call
